summary: Iteration 64 - Page Builder Enhancements Testing. All 32 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all 4 new enhancements: Custom CSS injection, Image uploads, Block duplication, and Multi-page selector. Fixed video block missing wrap() function for custom CSS support.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/files/upload (admin-only image upload) - working
Backend: POST /api/files/upload rejects non-image files
Backend: GET /api/public/files/{path} validates path prefix
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/landing returns page layout
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/about returns page layout
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/pricing returns page layout
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages returns all 3 editable pages
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/add-block for all 12 block types (hero, text, image, features, cta, testimonials, stats, spacer, two_column, pricing, logo_bar, video)
Backend: PUT /api/admin/pages/{slug} saves blocks with customCss in styles
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/publish works correctly
Backend: POST /api/admin/pages/{slug}/unpublish works correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/pages/{slug}/blocks/{block_id} removes blocks
Backend: GET /api/pages/{slug} public endpoint returns published pages
Backend: GET /api/admin/pages/block-templates/all returns 12 templates
Backend: Non-admin users get 401/403 on admin endpoints
Frontend: Page Builder loads at /admin/page-builder/landing
Frontend: All 12 block types visible in sidebar palette
Frontend: Page Switcher dropdown shows Landing, About, Pricing pages
Frontend: Page Switcher navigation works between pages
Frontend: Block duplication button visible on hover
Frontend: Block duplication creates copy of block
Frontend: Style panel has Custom CSS toggle
Frontend: Custom CSS textarea accepts input
Frontend: Image block shows Upload Image button in style panel
Frontend: DynamicPageRenderer renders About page with custom layout
Frontend: DynamicPageRenderer renders Pricing page with custom layout
Frontend: DynamicPageRenderer renders Landing page with custom layout
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Video block in DynamicPageRenderer.jsx was missing wrap() function for custom CSS injection - now all 12 block types support customCss
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 64 tested 4 new Page Builder enhancements: (1) Custom CSS injection per block via styles.customCss field, (2) Image uploads via POST /api/files/upload using Emergent Object Storage, (3) Block duplication button on hover, (4) Page Selector dropdown for editing landing/about/pricing pages. All 12 block types now support customCss in DynamicPageRenderer. The video block was missing wrap() function which was fixed. File upload endpoint validates image content-type. Public file serving at /api/public/files/{path} validates path starts with 'tunedrop/page-builder/'.

custom_css_injection.details: customCss field in styles object, injected via <style> tag per block

block_duplication.details: Duplicate button visible on hover, creates copy with new ID

multi_page_selector.details: Dropdown in top-left of Page Builder toolbar

dynamic_page_renderer.custom_css_support: All block types now use wrap() function
